name: TakeHomePay Budget Planner
description: A plug-and-play Excel budget template built around your actual take-home pay. Enter your salary and state, and it auto-calculates your monthly budget with recommended allocations for rent, savings, debt, and discretionary spending.

name: 1099 vs W2 Tax Calculator
description: Should you take the W-2 job or go freelance? This spreadsheet compares both scenarios side by side — including self-employment tax, the QBI deduction, and estimated quarterly payments.

name: 1099 Calculadora de Impuestos (ES)
description: ¿Trabajo W-2 o freelance 1099? Esta hoja de cálculo compara ambos escenarios lado a lado — incluyendo impuesto de trabajo por cuenta propia, la deducción QBI y pagos trimestrales estimados.
features: Comparación lado a lado W-2 vs 1099

name: Relocation Cost Comparison
description: Thinking about moving to a new city? This spreadsheet compares two locations side by side — taxes, cost of living, rent, and a weighted scoring matrix for quality-of-life factors.
